dict.string: Used to open Terminal so you can run `claude /login` when adding an account.
Copyright © 2026 Thanh Ngô. Licensed under MIT.
Claude Bar 10.21 — menu-bar manager for multiple Claude Code accounts

The "Enable iCloud sync" toggle in Diagnostics now also gates the claude.ai web profile Keychain cache. Previous releases blocked one of the two macOS "Allow ClaudeBar to access this keychain item?" prompts that fired after each Sparkle update — this build blocks the second one too. Toggle still resets to OFF on every update; flip it on once per release if you want either iCloud sync or web profile cookie restoration.

Fixed a second macOS Keychain ACL prompt firing on every update for users with linked claude.ai web profiles. The web session cache (claude-bar-web-usage-session item per account email) is now gated on the same iCloud sync toggle, so when the toggle is off no Keychain item is read.

When the iCloud sync toggle is off, claude.ai web profiles still work (cookies live in WKWebsiteDataStore on disk) but won't be restored from the Keychain cache. If a web profile fails to load after update, flip the toggle on once and restart polling.
